options.name: -abutted_master_clone_channel_access_only
options.description: Create pin blockages on abutted edges of master-clones that abut to its parent or other master-clones.

options.name: -area
options.description: Specifies the lower left x ,lower left y,upper right x, and upper right y coordinate of the blockage area.

options.name: -cell
options.description: Specifies the name of the module.The module name is not required if the command is run on a top-level module.

options.name: -edge
options.description: Specifies the integer value where edge numbering starts from lower-left corner of a partition clock-wise.

options.name: -excludePinPatterns
options.description: {pinNamePatternList} Specifies the pin-list on which this pin-blockage is not applicable. Pins which are specified in this list can be placed in this area legally.

options.name: -feedthru_blockage_file
options.description: Output a file with coordinates of blocked edges for pin assignment transformed into feedthru blockage_file format.

options.name: -includePinPatterns
options.description: {pinNamePatternList} Specifies the pin-list on which this pin-blockage is applicable. All other pins can be placed in this area legally.

options.name: -layer
options.description: Specifies the layer(s) for which the pin blockage is specified.

options.name: -name
options.description: Specifies the name of the partition pin blockage.

options.name: -offset_end
options.description: Specify a distance in microns from ending corner of the edge.

options.name: -offset_start
options.description: Specify a distance in microns from starting corner of the edge.
